style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">hash('order_1') = 184,036,158</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">Walk ring → primary: node-d, replicas: [node-a, node-b]</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">Effective primary = node-d</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">GET http://node-d:5000/fetch/order_1</span></font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="480" x="1079.75" y="970" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=default;" value="<font face="Verdana" style="font-size: 18px;">Node-D (Primary)</font>" vertex="1"> style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;entryX=0.373;entryY=-0.052;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;" target="8" value=""> <mxGeometry style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=default;" value="<font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 18px;">node-d → returns to coordinator</span></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="332.5" x="973.5" y="1220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">messageStore['order_1'] = { payload, role: 'primary' }</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">return { success: true } to coordinator</span></font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="480" x="1079.75" y="1150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" value=""> <mxGeometry height="50" relative="1" width="50" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="1049.35" y="1122.2" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1050" y="1220" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="13" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=default;" value="<font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 18px;">Coordinator → returns { payload, servedBy: 'node-d', source: 'primary', ... } to consumer</span></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="836.5" x="973.5" y="1350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="14" edge="1" x="1049" y="1270" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1048" y="1350" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="15" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">{ replicationResults } to coordinator</span></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="300" x="1079.75" y="1290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
